chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1040 - وَ سَأَلَ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلْمَرِيضِ هَلْ يَقْضِي اَلصَّلَوَاتِ إِذَا أُغْمِيَ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالَ «لاَ إِلاَّ اَلصَّلاَةَ اَلَّتِي أَفَاقَ فِيهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1040 - The Halabi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-about a sick person who faints. Does he need to make up the prayers he missed during his fainting?
Imam (as) replied: "No, except for the prayer in which he regained consciousness”.
